The Fool:
The Fool:
Universe kehna chahta hai ki aap, Dil ki suno aur dar ko side rakho. Naya raasta unknown hai, par potential se bhara hua hai. Overthink mat karo, bas pehla step lo.
The Magician:
The Magician:
Universe kehna chahta hai ki Aapke paas power hai. Bas focus aur action chahiye. Aap kafi capable ho.
The High Priestess:
The High Priestess:
Universe kehna chahta hai ki Sab kuch abhi dikh nahi raha. Apni intuition pe bharosa rakho. Answers apke andar hi hain.
The Empress:
The Empress:
Universe kehna chahta hai ki Growth aur abundance ka time hai. Khud ko aur apno ko nurture karo. Receive karna seekho.
The Emperor:
The Emperor:
Universe kehna chahta hai ki Strong bano, grounded raho. Boundaries aur structure zaroori hain. Uthke khudh ek control lo.
The Hierophant:
The Hierophant:
Universe kehna chahta hai ki Traditional raasta sahi rahega. Guidance lo, rules follow karo. patience rakhke process ko trust karo.
The Lovers:
The Lovers:
Universe kehna chahta hai ki Dil se decision lo. Alignment zaroori hai. Jo dil se sahi lagta hai wahi choose karo, sirf logon ko khush karne ya darr ki wajah se nahi.
The Chariot:
The Chariot:
Universe kehna chahta hai ki Focus rakho, rukna mat. Determination jeet dilayegi. khudko roko mat age bado.
Strength:
Strength:
Universe kehna chahta hai ki Soft rehke strong bano. Patience hi tumhari power hai. Apni andar ki strength pe bharosa.
The Hermit:
The Hermit:
Universe kehna chahta hai ki Thoda peeche hatna zaroori hai. Khud se baat karo. Use apko clarity milegi.
Wheel of Fortune:
Wheel of Fortune:
Universe kehna chahta hai ki Cheezein badalne wali hain. Timing tumhare favor mein hai. Bus flow ke saath chalo.
Justice:
Justice:
Universe kehna chahta hai ki Jo sahi hai wahi return milega. Aap honest rahiye , Jo cheez abhi unfair lag rahi thi, wo dheere-dheere theek jagah pe aa rahi hai, Universe cheezon ko right order mein la raha hai.
The Hanged Man:
The Hanged Man:
Universe kehna chahta hai ki Abhi rukna better hai. Perspective badalne ki zarurat hai. abhi apko wait karke dekhna chahiye.
Death:
Death:
Universe kehna chahta hai ki Purana khatam ho raha hai. Naya chapter tayaar hai. purane ko rokkar mat rakho use jane do let go karo.
Temperance:
Temperance:
Universe kehna chahta hai ki Slow aur balanced raho. Extreme se bacho. Universe harmony la raha hai.
The Devil:
The Devil:
Universe kehna chahta hai ki Attachment ya fear ka signal hai. Sach ko face karo.
Khudko free karo.
The Tower:
The Tower:
Universe kehna chahta hai ki Sudden change aa sakta hai. Par truth ke liye zaroori hai. Pehle se zyada strong base ke saath start karna.
The Star:
The Star:
Universe kehna chahta hai ki Hope wapas aa rahi hai. Healing start ho chuki hai. Jo faith aapne kahin kho diya tha, use wapas laane ka time hai.
The Moon:
The Moon:
Universe kehna chahta hai ki Confusion aur illusion ho sakta hai. Sab pe turant trust mat karo. Wait karo clarity baad mein milegi.
The Sun:
The Sun:
Universe kehna chahta hai ki Happiness aur success ka phase hai. Sach clearly dikhega. Is moment ko guilt ya darr ke bina feel aur enjoy karo.
Judgement:
Judgement:
Universe kehna chahta hai ki. Awakening ka moment hai. Past ka jawab mil raha hai. Khud ko chhota mat samjho confidently aage badho.
The World:
The World:
Universe kehna chahta hai ki. Cycle complete ho raha hai. Achievement celebrate karo. Jo chate the woh hogaya.
Ace of Wands:
Ace of Wands:
Universe kehna chahta hai ki. Nayi spark shuru ho rahi hai. Idea pe kaam shuru karo. jo karna chate ho wo bindas karo go for it.
Two of Wands:
Two of Wands:
Universe kehna chahta hai ki. Future planning ka time hai. Vision clear rakho. kuch bada socho.
Three of Wands:
Three of Wands:
Universe kehna chahta hai ki. Results door nahi hain. Patience rakho. Cheezein aage badh rahi hain, scope badh raha hai.
Four of Wands:
Four of Wands:
Universe kehna chahta hai ki Stability aur happiness. Celebrate small wins. Ab safety aur stability ka phase hai.
Five of Wands:
Five of Wands:
Universe kehna chahta hai ki. Confusion aur clashes ho sakte hain. Energy waste mat karo. kisi bhi tarha kaa drama avoid karo.
Six of Wands:
Six of Wands:
Universe kehna chahta hai ki. Success dikhegi. Log appreciate karenge. Jo deseve karte ho wo milega.
Seven of Wands:
Seven of Wands:
Universe kehna chahta hai ki Apni jagah defend karo. Give up mat karo. Ek strong stand lo.
Nine of Wands:
Nine of Wands:
Universe kehna chahta hai ki Thakaan hai par end paas hai. Himmat mat haaro. Yeh bas last push hai.
Page of Wands:
Page of Wands:
Universe kehna chahta hai ki Excitement aur curiosity hai. Naya message aa sakta hai. Naye options ya ideas try karke dekho.
Knight of Wands:
Knight of Wands:
Universe kehna chahta hai ki. Passion high hai. Par impulsive mat ho. Jaldbazi ya emotion mein decision mat lo.
Queen of Wands:
Queen of Wands:
Universe kehna chahta hai ki. Confidence shine kar raha hai. Khud pe bharosa rakho. Tumhari energy hi cheezein tumhari taraf kheench rahi hai.
King of Wands:
King of Wands:
Universe kehna chahta hai ki. Leadership energy hai. Vision ke saath chalo. Apni direction pe khud chalo, log follow karenge.
Ace of Cups:
Ace of Cups:
Universe kehna chahta hai ki. New emotional beginning hai. Dil khul raha hai. Jo feel ho raha hai, usse honestly accept karo.
Two of Cups:
Two of Cups:
Universe kehna chahta hai ki. Mutual connection strong hai. Energy match ho rahi hai. Sab cheezein balance aur peace mein chal rahi hain.
Three of Cups:
Three of Cups:
Universe kehna chahta hai ki Celebration aur support hai. Log saath khade hain. Support, fun aur connection ko feel karo.
Four of Cups:
Four of Cups:
Universe kehna chahta hai ki Dil uninterested lag sakta hai. Opportunity miss mat karo. Opportunity ya warning dono miss mat hone do.
Five of Cups:
Five of Cups:
Universe kehna chahta hai ki Past ka dukh heavy hai. Par sab lost nahi. Jo abhi stress ya dukh de raha hai, usse thoda side rakho.
Six of Cups:
Six of Cups:
Universe kehna chahta hai ki Past ya memories wapas aa rahi hain. Emotions soft hain. Har cheez soft aur calm tareeke se handle karo.
Seven of Cups:
Seven of Cups:
Universe kehna chahta hai ki Confusion zyada hai. Har option real nahi. Dil aur dimaag dono se balance karke choose karo.
Eight of Cups:
Eight of Cups:
Universe kehna chahta hai ki Emotionally move on karna zaroori hai. Jo nahi mil raha usse chhodo. Jo cheez ya situation tumhe hurt kar rahi hai, usse door ho jao.

Nine of Cups:
Universe kehna chahta hai ki Wish fulfill hone wali hai. Satisfaction milega. Ise samay ko enjoy karo.

Ten of Cups:
Universe kehna chahta hai ki Emotional happiness. Peace aur love. Life ka yeh samay positive aur supportive energy se bhara hai.
Page of Cups:
Page of Cups:
Universe kehna chahta hai ki Sweet message ya gesture. Emotions express honge. Care aur understanding vibe maintain karo.
Knight of Cups:
Knight of Cups:
Universe kehna chahta hai ki Romantic energy strong hai. Feelings flow kar rahi hain. Apne dil ko suno usko follow karo.
Queen of Cups:
Queen of Cups:
Universe kehna chahta hai ki Emotionally mature phase. Care aur understanding. Apne ya dusron ke growth aur care pe dhyaan do.
King of Cups:
King of Cups:
Universe kehna chahta hai ki Balance aur control. Emotion ko wisely handle karo. Apne emotions se guide hoke weak mat padna.
Ace of Pentacles:
Ace of Pentacles:
Universe kehna chahta hai ki New opportunity aa rahi hai. Strong base banega. Jaldbaazi, pressure ya sirf excitement mein decision mat lo.
Two of Pentacles:
Two of Pentacles:
Universe kehna chahta hai ki Balance zaroori hai. Sab manage ho jayega. Sab sambhav hai, bas tareeka smart hona chahiye.
Three of Pentacles:
Three of Pentacles:
Universe kehna chahta hai ki Teamwork se growth milegi. Support milega. Jo kaam heavy lag raha hai, wo teamwork se easy ho jayega.
Four of Pentacles:
Four of Pentacles:
Universe kehna chahta hai ki Zyada pakad ke rakhna loss laa sakta hai. Fear chhodo. Overthinking, over-planning, ya over-protecting se break lo
Five of Pentacles:
Five of Pentacles:
Universe kehna chahta hai ki Low phase ho sakta hai. Help available hai. Results dikh nahi rahe, par process kaam kar raha hota hai.
Six of Pentacles:
Six of Pentacles:
Universe kehna chahta hai ki Give & receive ka balance hai. Fairness aayegi. One-sided effort ka phase khatam.
Seven of Pentacles:
Seven of Pentacles:
Universe kehna chahta hai ki Patience rakho. Mehnat ka result time lega. Abhi action lene se zyada rukna faydemand hai
Eight of Pentacles:
Eight of Pentacles:
Universe kehna chahta hai ki Hard work continue rakho. Skill grow ho rahi hai. Results dikh nahi rahe, par foundation ban chuki hai.
Nine of Pentacles:
Nine of Pentacles:
Universe kehna chahta hai ki Independence aur comfort. Self-worth high hai. Har waqt push ya struggle zaroori nahi hota.
Ten of Pentacles:
Ten of Pentacles:
Universe kehna chahta hai ki Long-term security hai. Family aur future strong hai. Ab jo bhi next step hoga, collapse nahi karega

Page of Pentacles:
Universe kehna chahta hai ki Learning aur planning phase hai. Naya start possible hai. Jo unfamiliar lag raha hai, wahi next opportunity ho sakta hai.

Knight of Pentacles:
Universe kehna chahta hai ki Slow but sure progress. Consistency jeet dilayegi. Thakaan real hai, par direction sahi hai.
King of Pentacles:
King of Pentacles:
Universe kehna chahta hai ki Financial stability. Wise authority. Jo tumhare paas hai, wo stable aur protected hai.
Ace of Swords:
Ace of Swords:
Universe kehna chahta hai ki Truth saamne aa raha hai. Clear decision lo. Jo confusion tha, ab dheere-dheere clear ho raha hai.
Two of Swords:
Two of Swords:
Universe kehna chahta hai ki Decision avoid ho raha hai. Dil aur dimaag fight mein hain. Sab signs mil chuke hain, bas action baaki hai.
Three of Swords:
Three of Swords:
Universe kehna chahta hai ki Dard ya disappointment. Healing zaroori hai. Jo dard tum carry kar rahe ho, ab uska kaam khatam ho chuka hai.
Four of Swords:
Four of Swords:
Universe kehna chahta hai ki Rest aur pause ka time. Mind ko shant karo. Jo thakaan, dard ya emotional drain tha, wo reverse ho raha hai.
Five of Swords:
Five of Swords:
Universe kehna chahta hai ki Ego battle ka signal. Jeet ke bhi loss ho sakta hai. Apni energy prove karne mein mat kharch karo
Six of Swords:
Six of Swords:
Universe kehna chahta hai ki Healing journey shuru ho rahi hai. Better phase ki taraf move. Ye phase temporary hai, par important hai.
Seven of Swords:
Seven of Swords:
Universe kehna chahta hai ki Hidden truth ya deception. Savdhaan raho. Small signs matter ignore mat karo.
Eight of Swords:
Eight of Swords:
Universe kehna chahta hai ki Khud ko hi bandha hua feel kar rahe ho. Limits imaginary hain. Jab mind free hota hai, decisions naturally right hote hain.
Nine of Swords:
Nine of Swords:
Universe kehna chahta hai ki Overthinking aur anxiety. Sab real nahi jo dimaag bolta hai. Abhi jo ho raha hai, wo temp situation hai, permanently nahi.
Ten of Swords:
Ten of Swords:
Universe kehna chahta hai ki Painful ending. Par yahin se naya start. Old version release ho raha hai taaki new you aa sake.
Page of Swords:
Page of Swords:
Universe kehna chahta hai ki Curiosity aur questions. Information aayegi. Har cheez react karne se pehle dekho.
Knight of Swords:
Knight of Swords:
Universe kehna chahta hai ki Fast decisions. Par words sambhal ke. Jo bhi step lene wala ho, impact ko imagine karo.
Queen of Swords:
Queen of Swords:
Universe kehna chahta hai ki Truth aur honesty. Emotions ko side rakho. Confusion aur mixed signals ko avoid karo.
King of Swords:
King of Swords:
Universe kehna chahta hai ki Logic aur authority. Fair judgement lo. Tumhara mind guide karega, heart follow karega.
Eight of Wands:
Eight of Wands:
Universe kehna chahta hai ki cheezein ab tezi se aage badhengi. Jo ruka hua tha wo movement pakdega. Taiyaar raho, action aur speed ka time hai.
Ten of Wands:
Ten of Wands:
Universe kehna chahta hai ki aap bahut kuch akele utha rahe ho. Thoda bojh halka karo aur kaam baanto. Sab kuch khud karne ki zaroorat nahi hai.
Queen of Pentacles:
Queen of Pentacles:
Universe kehna chahta hai ki apna aur apno ka khayal rakho. Practical raho, par khud ko nurture karna mat bhoolo. Stability tumhare aas-paas ban rahi hai.
